acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md has a dated 0.5.0 section describing the #12 candidate-availability feature and no Unreleased section remains.
.rigor/rigor-ci.cjs is byte-identical to the committed dist/rigor.cjs.
dist/rigor.cjs is unchanged and byte-identical to a fresh build.
Full suite (test:all, bench, plugin validate --strict, git diff --check) passes.
constraints: No source, schema, test, skill, or documentation changes beyond the four release files.
The .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs change is exclusively a byte-identical copy of dist/rigor.cjs; no policy or workflow change.
The release commit reaches main only through a protected pull request with required checks; never a direct push.
stopConditions: an irreversible or external write is needed
credentials or personal data are encountered
